team.date_founded: Founded in the elegant ring-cities of Saturn, where football was always meant to be beautiful.
team.number_of_fans: Around 36 million connoisseurs who prize a sweeping move over a scrappy win.
team.badge: A golden ringed planet haloed in light, encircled by a band of stars.
team.home_kit: Royal purple and gold with a sweeping ring-band across the chest.
team.away_kit: Pale gold with purple trim and a thin halo line.
team.third_kit: Deep space-violet with a luminous golden ring.
team.history: Saturn Rings play the most beautiful football in the gas giants — fluid movement, intricate passing, and a refusal to do anything ugly. Aristocratic and aesthetic, they would rather lose with grace than win without it, a creed that thrills neutrals and occasionally costs them.
team.club_culture: Refined, aesthetic, and proud of its beautiful traditions. The Haloed value how you win almost as much as whether you win.
team.political_leaning: Saturnian old-aristocracy — cultured, conservative, and quietly grand.
trophy_cabinet: A graceful collection of titles won the beautiful way
legends: Aurelia Sand — the playmaker whose passing was called living poetry
achievements: Most admired playing style in the outer leagues

stadium.date_built: An elegant arena suspended within Saturn's inner rings.
stadium.sponsors: Patronised by the ring-cities' cultured trading houses.
stadium.pitch_size: Generously wide, to let the beautiful game breathe.
stadium.pitch_type: Immaculate managed turf, kept fast and true for crisp passing.
stadium.bio: Cassini Colosseum — The Halo — is among the most beautiful venues in the system, a ringed bowl that glows gold at dusk. The crowd applauds a perfect passing move as warmly as a goal.

training_facility.date_built: A professional complex on the inner ring's calmest band.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded by the cultured patronage of the ring-cities.
training_facility.bio: The Ring-Side Training Complex drills technique and movement above all, prizing the touch and timing that make the beautiful game possible. Ugliness is gently coached out.

manager.appearance: Silver-haired and impeccably dressed, watches matches like a patron at the opera.
manager.bio: Helios Voss is a possession aesthete who believes football is an art form first and a contest second. His Saturn sides pass with intricate, shifting beauty — and he changes formation mid-match like a composer changing key.
manager.personality: Cultured, calm, and quietly demanding of beauty.
manager.playing_history: An elegant playmaker of the old school.
manager.playing_philosophy: Keep the ball, move it beautifully, and reshape the team until the opponent simply cannot follow.
manager.culture: An aesthete who believes the beautiful game is the only game.
achievements: Built one of the most admired sides in the gas giants

managing_staff.appearance: Poised and precise, forever sketching shifting formations.
managing_staff.bio: Lumen Delacroix is the specialist in formation variation who lets Voss reshape the side seamlessly mid-match, the tactical chameleon behind the beauty.
managing_staff.playing_history: A versatile midfielder turned tactical specialist.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Shape is a living thing; change it before the opponent learns it.
achievements: Built the side's celebrated tactical flexibility

players.appearance: Calm and graceful, a keeper comfortable starting the beauty.
players.bio: Eon Vasquez is the composed keeper who begins every elegant move, balanced and assured with the ball at his feet.
achievements: Highest passing accuracy by a keeper

players.appearance: Elegant and willing, an overlapping full-back.
players.bio: Nora Blaze is the selfless full-back who joins the intricate movement without ever breaking its rhythm.

players.appearance: Tireless and steady, the workhorse who guards the beauty.
players.bio: Axel Frost is the relentless defender who covers the space the aesthetes leave behind, the unglamorous guardian of the art.

players.appearance: Composed and selfless, a defender who passes with poise.
players.bio: Livy Thane is the team-first centre-back who keeps the move flowing from the back, never the weak link in the chain.
achievements: Most progressive passes by a defender

players.appearance: Combative and firm, the rare edge in a refined side.
players.bio: Rook Steele is the aggressive centre-back who supplies the steel the aesthetes need, relishing the duels they avoid.
achievements: Most duels won in the side

players.appearance: Selfless and smooth, the heart of the passing web.
players.bio: Demi Volta is the team-first midfielder who keeps the intricate movement alive, always offering the next angle.
achievements: Most passes completed in the side

players.appearance: Willing and elegant, the tireless link.
players.bio: Cass Wren is the selfless connector who keeps the beautiful game flowing, doing the quiet work the artists rely on.

players.appearance: Balanced and refined, the metronome of the beauty.
players.bio: Pierce Lux is the composed pivot who sets the tempo of the intricate game, the calm at its centre.

players.appearance: Refined and predatory, an elegant finisher.
players.bio: Halo Creed is the selfish but stylish striker who finishes the beautiful build-up with a flourish, the jewel of the attack.

players.appearance: Self-assured and graceful, the creative finisher.
players.bio: Sera Nox is the selfish, gifted forward who both scores and conjures, the most watchable player in a watchable side.

players.appearance: Quick and self-assured, a wide creative threat.
players.bio: Yuki Storm is the selfish wide forward who turns the elegant possession into chances, hungry to outshine her strike partners.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Finn Ardent is the cautious veteran second keeper, comfortable on the ball and dependable when needed.

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, a dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Reese Dawn is the composed deputy who keeps the beautiful game intact when the starters rest.

players.appearance: Composed and steady, the experienced squad defender.
players.bio: Tara Veil is the balanced veteran who offers calm cover across the back line, a reassuring presence from the bench.

players.appearance: Balanced and willing, a tidy squad midfielder.
players.bio: Corin Ash is the dependable midfield deputy who keeps the side's rhythm when the starters rest, never a weak link.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with style and ambition.
players.bio: Mav Solaris is the gifted young forward pushing for a place, a selfish finisher with the flair the Haloed adore.
